reductionPath: law -> duty -> evaluated unmet-duty state surface

scenarios.explanation: Violation cannot exist without an applicable duty, so the failure-state remains reducible to law-grounded duty evaluation.

reductionPath: commitment -> non-continuation within the interaction frame

scenarios.explanation: Breach survives without duty because the authored packet depends on commitment rather than on any of the six core primitives.

reductionPath: law -> duty evaluation -> responsibility-side answerability corridor

scenarios.explanation: Without attribution or outcome linkage, liability still does not require primitive promotion; it remains shorthand for a failed answerability attachment.

reductionPath: power-produced outcome -> responsibility-side answerability only when attribution is in question

scenarios.explanation: An adverse outcome may exist as a power-side effect even where responsibility is not yet attached.

reductionPath: power-side outcome production -> responsibility-side attribution of result to actor

scenarios.explanation: Causation functions as an attribution basis for responsibility rather than as an independent primitive lane.
